items.title: INDO Shares Surge More Than 17% Amid Oil Price Spike — Retail Sees A Replay Of 2022 High
items.description: Shares of INDO hit an intraday high of $86.99 on March 7, 2022, shortly after Russia invaded Ukraine, and sent oil prices soaring.

items.title: Is Amazon Down In The US Right Now?
items.description: More than 21,100 issue reports were raised on Downdetector at the time of writing.

items.title: Tesla’s Dedicated Factory For Its Semi Truck In Nevada Nearing Completion As Deliveries Approach
items.description: As per Tesla’s website, the vehicle will be available in two variants namely standard range and long range.

items.title: Trump Names Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin As DHS Secretary, Replacing Kristi Noem
items.description: The outgoing Noem will become special envoy for The Shield of the Americas.
